description: Roster extension. Card flavor *'The inherently adaptive bodies of the slith made them coveted subjects for compleation.'* — that is a designer-stamped Phyrexian-attribution line, no ambiguity. Slith is canonically a Mirrodin-native creature subtype returning under MH3's heavy New-Phyrexia-throwback brief. Wired card → phyrexia, added to phyrexia's appears_on and member-list. Bonus grep for additional MH3 Phyrexian-flavored anchors returned only the 3 already-known (Ironworks, Wurmcoil Larva, Etched Slith); MH3 has the throwback theme but my corpus's slice of it is currently capped at these three. No further roster extension beyond this card.
